===== moon.pkg =====
import {
  "example/canonical/model",
  "KKKIIO/selene/app",
  "KKKIIO/selene/ecs",
  "KKKIIO/selene/entity",
  "KKKIIO/selene/event",
  "KKKIIO/selene/system",
  "KKKIIO/selene/ui_view",
  "moonbitlang/core/string",
}

supported_targets = "native+js"

===== state.generated.mbt =====
// Generated by selene-xaml@0.1.0. DO NOT EDIT.
// lock-format: 1
// input user fixtures/formatting/acceptance-view.xaml sha256=2b434a2360faddd869fc34044a18cc41fcffe2ae4ddbc8e60d36c73ff60a2f9f
// input moon-info fixtures/formatting/canonical-model.mbti sha256=65eb35037c6f705e3b84507853448e53987270d67a39747e91156d6471f2cf14

///|
pub type CanonicalFormattingItem = @model.CanonicalFormattingItem

///|
pub type CanonicalFormattingPatch = @model.CanonicalFormattingPatch

///|
pub type CanonicalFormattingState = @model.CanonicalFormattingState

===== view.generated.mbt =====
// Generated by selene-xaml@0.1.0. DO NOT EDIT.
// lock-format: 1
// input user fixtures/formatting/acceptance-view.xaml sha256=2b434a2360faddd869fc34044a18cc41fcffe2ae4ddbc8e60d36c73ff60a2f9f
// input moon-info fixtures/formatting/canonical-model.mbti sha256=65eb35037c6f705e3b84507853448e53987270d67a39747e91156d6471f2cf14

///|
pub(all) enum CanonicalFormattingViewAction {
  SelectItem(String)
} derive(Eq, Debug)

///|
pub(all) suberror CanonicalFormattingViewError {
  AlreadyMounted
  NotMounted
  DeadEntity
  DuplicateKey(String, String)
  InvalidPatch(String)
  Host(@ui_view.HostError)
} derive(Eq, Debug)

///|
pub impl Show for CanonicalFormattingViewError with fn output(self, logger) {
  match self {
    AlreadyMounted =>
      logger.write_string("view is already mounted on this entity")
    NotMounted => logger.write_string("view is not mounted on this entity")
    DeadEntity => logger.write_string("view entity is not alive")
    DuplicateKey(path, key) =>
      logger.write_string("duplicate or empty key in " + path + ": " + key)
    InvalidPatch(message) => logger.write_string(message)
    Host(error) => logger.write_string(error.to_string())
  }
}

///|
fn generated_compute_view_model(
  model : CanonicalFormattingState,
) -> CanonicalFormattingState {
  model
}

///|
#warnings("-unused_value")
fn generated_rect_component(
  value : String,
  index : Int,
  path : String,
  image_region : Bool,
) -> Double raise CanonicalFormattingViewError {
  let parts = value.split(" ").filter(part => part != "").collect()
  let selected = if image_region {
    if parts.length() != 4 {
      raise InvalidPatch(
        "image region requires x y width height for " + path + ": " + value,
      )
    }
    parts[index]
  } else {
    match parts.length() {
      1 => parts[0]
      2 => if index == 0 || index == 2 { parts[1] } else { parts[0] }
      4 =>
        match index {
          0 => parts[3]
          1 => parts[0]
          2 => parts[1]
          _ => parts[2]
        }
      _ => raise InvalidPatch("invalid rect value for " + path + ": " + value)
    }
  }
  let parsed = @string.parse_double(selected) catch {
    _ =>
      raise InvalidPatch(
        "invalid number for " + path + ": " + selected.to_owned(),
      )
  }
  if image_region &&
    ((index < 2 && parsed < 0.0) || (index >= 2 && parsed <= 0.0)) {
    raise InvalidPatch("invalid image region for " + path + ": " + value)
  }
  parsed
}

///|
#warnings("-struct_never_constructed")
pub struct CanonicalFormattingView {}

///|
#warnings("-unused_field")
priv struct GeneratedViewRecord {
  mut model : CanonicalFormattingState
  mut view_model : CanonicalFormattingState
  mut specs : Array[@ui_view.NodeSpec]
}

///|
let generated_records_by_world : Map[
  UInt,
  Map[@entity.Entity, GeneratedViewRecord],
] = Map([])

///|
fn generated_view_records() -> Map[@entity.Entity, GeneratedViewRecord] {
  let world_id = @ecs.require_current_world().id()
  generated_records_by_world.get_or_init(world_id, fn() { Map([]) })
}

///|
pub(all) struct CanonicalFormattingViewActionEvent {
  entity : @entity.Entity
  action : CanonicalFormattingViewAction
}

///|
/// World-isolated typed actions emitted by this view.
pub let action_event_bus : @event.Events[CanonicalFormattingViewActionEvent] = @event.Events()

///|
let generated_event_reader : @event.EventReader[@ui_view.UiViewEvent] = @event.EventReader()

///|
fn generated_specs(
  state : CanonicalFormattingState,
) -> Array[@ui_view.NodeSpec] raise CanonicalFormattingViewError {
  let nodes : Array[@ui_view.NodeSpec] = []
  nodes.push({
    key: "extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-root",
    parent: None,
    kind: @ui_view.NodeKind::View,
    text: "",
    source: "",
    active: true,
    enabled: true,
    focusable: false,
    tab_index: 0,
    focus_scope: true,
    auto_focus: false,
    navigation_up: "",
    navigation_down: "",
    navigation_left: "",
    navigation_right: "",
    style: {
      absolute: false,
      left: 0.0,
      top: 0.0,
      width: @ui_view.LayoutValue::Auto,
      height: @ui_view.LayoutValue::Auto,
      margin_left: 0.0,
      margin_top: 0.0,
      margin_right: 0.0,
      margin_bottom: 0.0,
      padding_left: 0.0,
      padding_top: 0.0,
      padding_right: 0.0,
      padding_bottom: 0.0,
      background: "",
      border_color: "",
      border: 0.0,
      radius: 0.0,
      outline_color: "",
      outline_width: 0.0,
      outline_offset: 0.0,
      color: "",
      font_family: "",
      font_size: 0.0,
      bold: false,
      align: @ui_view.TextAlign::Left,
      wrap: false,
      z_index: 0,
      tint: "",
      source_region: None,
      fit: @ui_view.ImageFit::Fill,
      direction: @ui_view.FlexDirection::Column,
      flex_basis: @ui_view.LayoutValue::Auto,
      flex_grow: 0.0,
      flex_shrink: 1.0,
      row_gap: 0.0,
      column_gap: 0.0,
      grid_rows: [],
      grid_columns: [],
      grid_auto_flow: @ui_view.GridAutoFlow::Row,
      grid_row: None,
      grid_column: None,
      grid_row_span: 1,
      grid_column_span: 1,
      horizontal_scroll: false,
      vertical_scroll: false,
      scrollbar_width: 0.0,
    },
    visual_state_groups: [],
  })
  let generated_seen_1 : Map[String, Bool] = Map([])
  for generated_item_1 in state.items {
    let generated_item_key_1 = generated_item_1.id
    if generated_item_key_1 == "" ||
      generated_seen_1.contains(generated_item_key_1) {
      raise DuplicateKey("items", generated_item_key_1)
    }
    generated_seen_1[generated_item_key_1] = true
    nodes.push({
      key: "extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-root/items:\{generated_item_key_1}/extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-button",
      parent: Some("extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-root"),
      kind: @ui_view.NodeKind::Button,
      text: "",
      source: "",
      active: true,
      enabled: true,
      focusable: true,
      tab_index: 10,
      focus_scope: false,
      auto_focus: true,
      navigation_up: "",
      navigation_down: "Stop",
      navigation_left: "",
      navigation_right: "",
      style: {
        absolute: false,
        left: 0.0,
        top: 0.0,
        width: @ui_view.LayoutValue::Auto,
        height: @ui_view.LayoutValue::Auto,
        margin_left: 4,
        margin_top: 1,
        margin_right: 2,
        margin_bottom: 3,
        padding_left: 0.0,
        padding_top: 0.0,
        padding_right: 0.0,
        padding_bottom: 0.0,
        background: "",
        border_color: "",
        border: 0.0,
        radius: 0.0,
        outline_color: "",
        outline_width: 0.0,
        outline_offset: 0.0,
        color: "",
        font_family: "",
        font_size: 0.0,
        bold: false,
        align: @ui_view.TextAlign::Left,
        wrap: false,
        z_index: 0,
        tint: "",
        source_region: None,
        fit: @ui_view.ImageFit::Fill,
        direction: @ui_view.FlexDirection::Column,
        flex_basis: @ui_view.LayoutValue::Auto,
        flex_grow: 0.0,
        flex_shrink: 1.0,
        row_gap: 0.0,
        column_gap: 0.0,
        grid_rows: [],
        grid_columns: [],
        grid_auto_flow: @ui_view.GridAutoFlow::Row,
        grid_row: None,
        grid_column: None,
        grid_row_span: 1,
        grid_column_span: 1,
        horizontal_scroll: false,
        vertical_scroll: false,
        scrollbar_width: 0.0,
      },
      visual_state_groups: [],
    })
    nodes.push({
      key: "extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-root/items:\{generated_item_key_1}/extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-label",
      parent: Some(
        "extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-root/items:\{generated_item_key_1}/extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-button",
      ),
      kind: @ui_view.NodeKind::Text,
      text: generated_item_1.label,
      source: "",
      active: true,
      enabled: true,
      focusable: false,
      tab_index: 0,
      focus_scope: false,
      auto_focus: false,
      navigation_up: "",
      navigation_down: "",
      navigation_left: "",
      navigation_right: "",
      style: {
        absolute: false,
        left: 0.0,
        top: 0.0,
        width: @ui_view.LayoutValue::Auto,
        height: @ui_view.LayoutValue::Auto,
        margin_left: 0.0,
        margin_top: 0.0,
        margin_right: 0.0,
        margin_bottom: 0.0,
        padding_left: 0.0,
        padding_top: 0.0,
        padding_right: 0.0,
        padding_bottom: 0.0,
        background: "",
        border_color: "",
        border: 0.0,
        radius: 0.0,
        outline_color: "",
        outline_width: 0.0,
        outline_offset: 0.0,
        color: "",
        font_family: "",
        font_size: 0.0,
        bold: false,
        align: @ui_view.TextAlign::Left,
        wrap: false,
        z_index: 0,
        tint: "",
        source_region: None,
        fit: @ui_view.ImageFit::Fill,
        direction: @ui_view.FlexDirection::Column,
        flex_basis: @ui_view.LayoutValue::Auto,
        flex_grow: 0.0,
        flex_shrink: 1.0,
        row_gap: 0.0,
        column_gap: 0.0,
        grid_rows: [],
        grid_columns: [],
        grid_auto_flow: @ui_view.GridAutoFlow::Row,
        grid_row: None,
        grid_column: None,
        grid_row_span: 1,
        grid_column_span: 1,
        horizontal_scroll: false,
        vertical_scroll: false,
        scrollbar_width: 0.0,
      },
      visual_state_groups: [],
    })
  }
  nodes
}

///|
/// Mounts this view on an alive root entity in the current world.
/// Destroying the root ends the view lifetime.
pub fn CanonicalFormattingView::mount(
  entity : @entity.Entity,
  model : CanonicalFormattingState,
) -> Unit raise CanonicalFormattingViewError {
  if !entity.is_alive() {
    raise DeadEntity
  }
  let records = generated_view_records()
  if records.contains(entity) {
    raise AlreadyMounted
  }
  let view_model = generated_compute_view_model(model)
  let desired = generated_specs(view_model)
  let host = @ui_view.ViewHost::new()
  host.mount(entity, desired) catch {
    error => raise Host(error)
  }
  records[entity] = { model, view_model, specs: desired }
}

///|
/// Atomically replaces the model of a mounted view in the current world.
pub fn CanonicalFormattingView::replace(
  entity : @entity.Entity,
  model : CanonicalFormattingState,
) -> Unit raise CanonicalFormattingViewError {
  let records = generated_view_records()
  let record = match records.get(entity) {
    Some(value) => value
    None => raise NotMounted
  }
  if !entity.is_alive() {
    records.remove(entity)
    raise DeadEntity
  }
  let view_model = generated_compute_view_model(model)
  let desired = generated_specs(view_model)
  let mutations = @ui_view.reconcile_specs(record.specs, desired)
  if mutations.length() > 0 {
    let host = @ui_view.ViewHost::new()
    host.apply(entity, mutations) catch {
      error => raise Host(error)
    }
  }
  record.model = model
  record.view_model = view_model
  record.specs = desired
}

///|
/// Atomically applies patches in order to a mounted view in the current world.
pub fn CanonicalFormattingView::apply(
  entity : @entity.Entity,
  patches : Array[CanonicalFormattingPatch],
) -> Unit raise CanonicalFormattingViewError {
  let record = match generated_view_records().get(entity) {
    Some(value) => value
    None => raise NotMounted
  }
  let mut items = record.model.items.copy()
  for patch in patches {
    match patch {
      CanonicalFormattingPatch::ItemsReplace(values) => items = values.copy()
      CanonicalFormattingPatch::ItemUpsert(value) => {
        let mut replaced = false
        for index, current in items {
          if current.id == value.id {
            items[index] = value
            replaced = true
            break
          }
        }
        if !replaced {
          items.push(value)
        }
      }
      CanonicalFormattingPatch::ItemRemove(key) => {
        let mut removed = false
        for value in items {
          if value.id == key {
            removed = true
            break
          }
        }
        if !removed {
          raise InvalidPatch(
            "patch remove key does not exist: " + key.to_string(),
          )
        }
        items = items.filter(value => value.id != key)
      }
      CanonicalFormattingPatch::ItemMove((key, destination)) => {
        let retained : Array[CanonicalFormattingItem] = []
        let mut moved : CanonicalFormattingItem? = None
        for value in items {
          if value.id == key {
            moved = Some(value)
          } else {
            retained.push(value)
          }
        }
        guard moved is Some(value) else {
          raise InvalidPatch(
            "patch move key does not exist: " + key.to_string(),
          )
        }
        let destination = destination.reinterpret_as_int()
        if destination < 0 || destination > retained.length() {
          raise InvalidPatch("patch move destination is out of range")
        }
        retained.insert(destination, value)
        items = retained
      }
    }
  }
  CanonicalFormattingView::replace(entity, { ..record.model, items, })
}

///|
fn generated_handle_event(
  record : GeneratedViewRecord,
  event : @ui_view.UiEvent,
) -> CanonicalFormattingViewAction? {
  if !record.specs.any(spec => spec.key == event.key) {
    return None
  }
  if event.kind == @ui_view.UiEventKind::Click {
    for generated_action_item in record.view_model.items {
      let generated_action_key = generated_action_item.id
      let generated_action_node_key = "extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-root/items:\{generated_action_key}/extraordinarily-long-formatting-acceptance-button"
      if event.key == generated_action_node_key {
        return Some(
          CanonicalFormattingViewAction::SelectItem(generated_action_key),
        )
      }
    }
  }
  None
}

///|
fn generated_route_events(_world : @ecs.World) -> Unit {
  let records = generated_view_records()
  let dead : Array[@entity.Entity] = []
  for entity, _ in records {
    if !entity.is_alive() {
      dead.push(entity)
    }
  }
  for entity in dead {
    records.remove(entity)
  }
  for raw in generated_event_reader.read(@ui_view.view_event_bus) {
    match records.get(raw.entity) {
      Some(record) =>
        match generated_handle_event(record, raw.event) {
          Some(action) => action_event_bus.send({ entity: raw.entity, action })
          None => ()
        }
      None => ()
    }
  }
}

///|
/// Installs the host, action bus, event routing, and lifetime cleanup.
pub fn plugin(app : @app.App) -> @app.App {
  app
  .add_plugin(@ui_view.plugin)
  .add_message(action_event_bus)
  .add_system(
    @system.PostUpdate,
    generated_route_events,
    system_name="selene_xaml_CanonicalFormattingView_events",
  )
}

===== view.generated.mbt.map.json =====
{
  "mappings": [
    {
      "source": "fixtures/formatting/acceptance-view.xaml",
      "original_offset": 368,
      "generated_offset": 5304,
      "length": 11
    },
    {
      "source": "fixtures/formatting/acceptance-view.xaml",
      "original_offset": 406,
      "generated_offset": 5349,
      "length": 19
    },
    {
      "source": "fixtures/formatting/acceptance-view.xaml",
      "original_offset": 755,
      "generated_offset": 7848,
      "length": 22
    }
  ]
}

===== selene-xaml.lock.json =====
{
  "format_version": 1,
  "generator": "selene-xaml@0.1.0",
  "runtime": "KKKIIO/selene",
  "inputs": [
    { "owner": "user", "path": "fixtures/formatting/acceptance-view.xaml", "sha256": "2b434a2360faddd869fc34044a18cc41fcffe2ae4ddbc8e60d36c73ff60a2f9f" },
    { "owner": "moon-info", "path": "fixtures/formatting/canonical-model.mbti", "sha256": "65eb35037c6f705e3b84507853448e53987270d67a39747e91156d6471f2cf14" }
  ],
  "resolved_contract": { "kind": "mbti", "path": "fixtures/formatting/canonical-model.mbti", "package": "example/canonical/model", "sha256": "65eb35037c6f705e3b84507853448e53987270d67a39747e91156d6471f2cf14" },
  "requested_outputs": ["moon.pkg", "state.generated.mbt", "view.generated.mbt", "view.generated.mbt.map.json", "selene-xaml.lock.json"],
  "output_naming": { "package_directory": ".", "state": "state.generated.mbt", "view": "view.generated.mbt", "source_map": "view.generated.mbt.map.json", "lock": "selene-xaml.lock.json" },
  "package_alias": { "alias": "model", "package": "example/canonical/model" },
  "imported_sidecars": [],
  "host_capability": { "package": "KKKIIO/selene/ui_view", "contract": "ui-view", "version": "0.1.0", "operations": ["mount", "apply"] },
  "abi_fingerprint": "sha256:c4902cab8247473c114b7362f45197905831236c1ec514c3d05ff2b24adb0618",
  "outputs": [    { "owner": "selene-xaml", "path": "moon.pkg", "sha256": "81f0c024a87c60032cd7ba7ba9a7d57ff1e8e9688a0feaee408de49178ca99f7" },
    { "owner": "selene-xaml", "path": "state.generated.mbt", "sha256": "68787721477207ba4f83045b21fc3bf4f506cd61539c8a4b56f50b2580181b6f" },
    { "owner": "selene-xaml", "path": "view.generated.mbt", "sha256": "97df275e753afcb537b8d23f534092be88873e6fb5718f92ad0d3e9adfc59436" },
    { "owner": "selene-xaml", "path": "view.generated.mbt.map.json", "sha256": "b48c998d2a3c225432e03d077e8f96cf38e1bb9960c70c0acf4bc08ddf3fe097" }
  ],
  "lock_path": "selene-xaml.lock.json"
}
